annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: monarchical or military memory is mediated through tomb, trophies, or crown objects
Political-military legitimacy may be understood through symbolic objects.
cmt.rival_reading: The objects may be literal, but they also condense monarchy, victory, and imperial memory.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'napoleon-symbolic-objects' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.gloss_notes: French symbolic-object terms need context-specific translation before CMT mapping.
